question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
question-bank-backed/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit maven compiler source and target properties set to 21.
question-bank-backed/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler explicitly targets JDK 21 features and bytecode, preventing fallback to older defaults.

question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency required because it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
question-bank-backed/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.xml.bind classes which are no longer part of the JDK module path.

question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB runtime implementation dependency required for Java 11+.
question-bank-backed/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for JAXB implementation classes which are no longer bundled in the JDK.

question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB core dependency required for Java 11+.
question-bank-backed/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for internal JAXB core classes which are no longer bundled in the JDK.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.general_idea: Add missing Angular form modules to support reactive and template-driven forms in the application.
question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.why_exists: Runtime error: forms directives (e.g., ngModel, formControlName) will fail to compile or throw 'Template parse errors' if FormsModule/ReactiveFormsModule are not imported.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.general_idea: Add HttpClientModule to enable HTTP requests in the Angular application.
question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.why_exists: Runtime error: HttpClient injection or usage will fail with 'NullInjectorError' if HttpClientModule is not imported.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.general_idea: Register the new GeneratePaperComponent in the Angular module declarations.
question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.why_exists: Runtime error: Component template parsing will fail if the component is used in templates but not declared in the module.
